title: buxus glomerata
intro: Buxus glomerata, also known as the Chinese Boxwood or Japanese Boxwood, is a type of evergreen shrub native to East Asia, belonging to the family Buxaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and fever. The health benefits of Buxus glomerata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and even have antioxidant effects. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are typically used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
